title: Structs 3
description: You can define methods on structs using `impl` blocks. Methods take `&self` as their first parameter.
instructions: Implement the methods for the Package struct.
hints: For is_international, compare the sender and recipient country portions.
You can use string slicing or check if sender starts with the same prefix as recipient.
For get_fees, multiply weight_in_grams by cents_per_gram.
explanation: Methods are defined in `impl` blocks and take `&self` (a reference to the instance) as their first parameter. Associated functions (like `new`) don't take `self` and are called with `::` syntax. Methods are called with dot notation. The `self` parameter gives access to the struct's fields.
